20px; }

Thurston Geometries

Select a geometry to explore:

Hyperbolic (H³)

Hyperbolic 3-space with various tilings and manifolds

Euclidean (E³)

Flat 3D space, familiar geometry

Spherical (S³)

3-sphere geometry

H² × E

Hyperbolic plane times line

S² × E

Sphere times line

Nil

Nil geometry

SL(2,R)

Special linear group geometry

Sol

Solvable geometry

Quick Start

import * as THREE from 'three';
import {ThurstonLite, cubeSet} from './thurston/thurstonHyp.js';

const thurston = new ThurstonLite(cubeSet, {});
thurston.run();
